name: [S.T.A.L.K.E.R RPG]
description:
Decided to make a S.T.A.L.K.E.R RPG bot since the new game came out. I missed the series and loving the new game. Hopefully they fix the bugs and problems. Eurojank am I right?

Listen to this while you chat. Awesome song used in the ending of Pripyat.

And uhm… don’t mind the token count. Proxy is preferable for this. Highly doubt LLM would handle this without shitting itself. It’s beta after all.

Report any problems.
creator: Thefogiscoming0
